title: VRanilla+
description: A lightweight modpack focused for VR with Vanilla+ Quality of Life Additions
body:
This Modpack was tailored with VR in mind.
It's a very lightweight modpack as to make it easy to run in VR for most computers.
The modpack is a Vanilla + Style modpack, meaning that the mods do not alter much the funcinality of the vanilla gameplay with some Quality of Life additions.

I made it to play the pack myself and spent quite some time tailoring it, so figured I could share this configuration for others to enjoy too.

Features:
- Furniture and decorations from multiple mods to make your builds feel amazing.
- Build QoL like cicling paintings or being able to cut wood and more in the stone cutter.
- Teleporters from Waystones.
- ~~Connected fussion textures.~~ Temporarely disabled because of a crash. It's been reported and will be reenabled once it works again.
- Easier Inventory Management including sorting, easy to see drawers and tool replacing.
- Experience seasons in many biomes.
- Better vanilla tools. Replant seeds automatically using a hoe, see the coordinates with a compass or keep the totem in your inventory.

Please let me know in the comments if you can think of any improvements or if you tried it and enjoyed it!
